title: Can't find a proper physical plan when using read_from_storage TIFLASH  hint for a table containing generate column
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```
create table tt3(a int,b int ,c int as (a+b));
alter table tt3 set tiflash replica 2;
explain select /*+ read_from_storage(TIFLASH[tt3]) */ * from tt3 limit 2;
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
success
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
ERROR 1815 (HY000): Internal : Can't find a proper physical plan for this query
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tt4(x int, y int, z int AS (x * y) STORED, w varchar(255) DEFAULT 'default_value');
INSERT INTO tt4 (x, y) VALUES (1, 2), (NULL, 3), (4, NULL);
SELECT * FROM tt4 WHERE z > 0 LIMIT 3;
CREATE TABLE tt5(a float, b int, c datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, d int AS (CAST(a AS SIGNED) + b));
key_bug_features: read_from_storage TIFLASH hint with generated column
